name: United Savings
description_short: United Savings Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving North Dakota and Minnesota with comprehensive banking, lending, and investment services.
description_long:
United Savings Credit Union operates as a full-service credit union based in the Upper Midwest, serving members across North Dakota and Minnesota. The organization functions as a traditional cooperative financial institution with routing number 291378486, positioning itself as a community-focused alternative to commercial banks. The credit union maintains an active branch network and digital banking capabilities to serve its membership base. United Savings has been actively promoting membership growth and member engagement through seasonal campaigns and product enhancements. The organization emphasizes financial education and member wellness as core operational values, reflected in their published educational video library and promotional campaigns such as April Youth Month activities.

United Savings Credit Union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products across three main categories: savings and investment accounts, checking and payment services, and borrowing products. On the savings side, they provide regular share savings, money market accounts, term certificates, individual retirement accounts, youth accounts, and specialty savings products like Christmas Club accounts. Their checking offerings include multiple tiers—Advantage Checking, Basic Checking, and Cha Ching Checking (an interest-bearing checking account)—plus credit card services including Visa credit cards and an eZCard product. The lending portfolio includes consumer loans, vehicle loans, personal loans, share-covered loans, student loans (offered through Sparrow partner), mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and commercial lending products for business customers.

United Savings differentiates itself through several specific offerings and member benefits. The Cha Ching Checking account represents a distinctive product emphasizing interest earnings on checking balances. The credit union actively advertises promotional rates, including a 1.99% APR balance transfer offer (through 5/1/26) and an auto loan refinancing guarantee promising rate reductions of at least 1.00% APR from competing lenders. They partner with third-party providers like Sparrow for student loans and offer Brella mobile card management technology for fraud detection and account monitoring. Member services include financial calculators, NADA vehicle guides, Quicken/QuickBooks integration, MoneyPass ATM access, and IDProtect identity protection services. The organization explicitly targets youth engagement through dedicated young saver products and promotional events.

Honest assessment: United Savings Credit Union is a legitimate regional credit union offering genuine full-service banking with competitive promotional offers and member-focused features. The main caveat is geographic limitation—membership appears restricted to North Dakota and Minnesota service areas. Their product suite is comprehensive but not distinctive in fundamental ways; most offerings mirror standard credit union and bank products. The organization's strength lies in local presence, member community focus, and current promotional rates rather than innovative financial products. For members within their service area seeking traditional banking with cooperative ownership structure and reasonable rate promotions, United Savings presents a viable alternative to large national banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Regular Share Savings and Money Market accounts
Term Certificates and Individual Retirement Accounts
Youth Savings Accounts and Young Savers products
Advantage Checking and Basic Checking accounts
Visa Credit Cards with balance transfer promotions
Auto, motorcycle, RV, ATV, and boat loan financing with rate-beat guarantee
Personal loans, consumer loans, and share-covered loans
Mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and secondary market mortgage loans
Commercial vehicle, equipment, and real estate lending
Brella mobile card management with fraud alerts and balance monitoring
Financial calculators and educational video library
pros: Interest-bearing Cha Ching Checking account allows members to earn returns on checking balances
Auto loan refinancing guarantee offers minimum 1.00% APR reduction compared to other lenders' rates
1.99% APR balance transfer promotion on Visa credit cards for 12 months (through 5/1/26)
Comprehensive product suite includes mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and commercial lending
Partner access to student loans through Sparrow covering undergraduate, graduate, and refinance options
Brella mobile app provides real-time card alerts, balance checks, and card lock/unlock functionality
Published financial education video library and calculators support member financial literacy
Youth-focused products including dedicated young saver accounts and monthly promotional events
cons: Geographic membership restriction limited to North Dakota and Minnesota service areas
No mention of online-only account opening or digital-first banking features competitive with neobanks
Student loan product is partner-provided through Sparrow rather than direct credit union offering
Promotional rates come with standard restrictions and require underwriting approval
Limited information on fee structures, minimum balance requirements, or account maintenance costs
best_for: North Dakota and Minnesota residents seeking traditional credit union banking with local branch access
Vehicle buyers looking to refinance auto loans with guaranteed rate reductions from competing lenders
Credit card users interested in balance transfer promotions and fraud protection via Brella alerts
Small business owners requiring commercial loans, equipment financing, or business real estate lending
diagnosis: United Savings Credit Union is best for members within North Dakota and Minnesota who value community-based banking with physical branch access and current promotional rates on refinancing and balance transfers. The primary caveat is geographic restriction—this credit union only serves specific regional areas, making it unsuitable for those outside North Dakota and Minnesota service territories.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Member-owned credit union serving North Dakota and Minnesota with banking, lending, and investment services.
